title: dangling :comparator tag silently ignored at compile
description: TRIGGER: script contains ':comparator' as the last form in a clause with nothing following it (e.g. 'if header :comparator "Subject" "x" { keep; }' — tag before field names instead of after). In validate_stmt, the comparator-check arm does 'clause.get(i+1)' and silently skips when None. BAD BEHAVIOR: the unsupported-comparator error is never raised; the evaluator defaults to AsciiCasemap. A script with a mis-formed or dangling :comparator tag compiles and runs with a different comparator than the script author intended, with no diagnostic.
